name: gitlab
description: GitLab repository workflows for Codex backed by a local MCP server and glab.

interface.shortDescription: GitLab repository operations through a local MCP server
interface.longDescription: Bring GitLab repository workflows into Codex through a local MCP server that validates glab auth, uses glab for repo discovery and cloning, and uses git for pull and push operations with safe defaults. Discovery metadata is tuned for GitLab remote context and future marketplace install suggestions.
defaultPrompt: Use GitLab tools for this repository checkout
Clone or sync a GitLab repository through the plugin
Push the current branch to its GitLab remote
